title: Yanmar Acquires Land for New Factory to Test Marine Hydrogen Engines
content: Yanmar Power Solutions Co., Ltd. has acquired land at the Phoenix industrial site in Amagasaki City, Hyogo Prefecture, to construct a new factory dedicated to next-generation fuel engines. This strategic move aims to reorganize and strengthen the company's production system in anticipation of increased demand for decarbonized marine and land-use engines. The new facility, scheduled to begin operations around March 2029, will focus on activities such as the test operation of marine hydrogen engines. Yanmar is leveraging its expertise to develop powertrains compatible with hydrogen, methanol, and ammonia to support the marine industry's goal of achieving carbon neutrality by 2050. The initiative underscores Yanmar's commitment to advancing low-carbon technologies and establishing a robust production infrastructure for cleaner fuels.
author: Analysts Account
